name: Verkada Physical Security Platform API
what_it_does: Verkada REST API for cloud-managed physical security platform. Enables AI agents to manage camera and video surveillance data, handle access control and door management, access alarm and environmental sensor data, retrieve visitor management and lobby access data, manage device inventory and health monitoring, handle video export and clip management, access analytics and occupancy data, retrieve security event and alert data, manage user and permission management, and integrate physical security data with ITSM, HR, and building management systems.
use_cases: Managing access control and door permissions from security operations automation agents
Accessing video analytics and occupancy data from smart building agents
Retrieving security events and alerts from physical security intelligence agents
Integrating access data with HR onboarding from enterprise security agents
not_for: Legacy on-premises CCTV systems without cloud-connected video surveillance
Large enterprise physical security without SMB-to-enterprise cloud focus
Non-physical security without camera and access control data management
best_when: An enterprise, school, or organization using Verkada wants AI agents to automate access control provisioning, video analytics, security event response, occupancy monitoring, and integration with HR and ITSM systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Surveillance video data captures personally identifiable information. Access control data reveals employee and visitor location history. Video surveillance requires notice and consent in many jurisdictions. Biometric data (facial recognition if used) requires BIPA and GDPR compliance. Video retention policies must comply with local regulations.

auth.notes: Verkada uses API key authentication with granular permission scopes. Organization-level credentials. Developer portal with comprehensive API documentation. Webhooks for security events. No OAuth — API key with scoped permissions. Strong developer-friendly design.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — hardware + software subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-device hardware purchase plus annual software license
pricing.notes: San Mateo, California. Founded 2016. Cloud-native physical security platform. $4.5B valuation (raised $205M Series D 2022). 25,000+ organizations. Hardware-software model: Verkada cameras and readers with cloud management. Competes with traditional on-premises systems (Genetec, Milestone) and Avigilon. Strong SMB-to-enterprise market.

performance.rate_limits: 500 requests per minute per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Surveillance video captures PII — notice, consent, and retention policies required
Biometric data (facial recognition if enabled) — BIPA (Illinois) and GDPR require explicit consent
No public MCP server — well-documented API key REST API with scoped permissions
Access control automation must respect emergency egress — never automate lockdowns without safety protocols
Video export automation must comply with local CCTV data retention laws
FedRAMP authorization — government customers may have additional restrictions on API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Physical security video and access data. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR. API key with scopes. US/EU. Biometric law compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Physical security data. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR. API key with scopes. US/EU. Surveillance privacy.
